reflections.pattern: MARA social media automation achieved breakthrough milestone: first live post published to X on 2026-03-27 after Google Ads dashboard merge (PR #44)—marketing streak stuck at 0 days for 6 consecutive days (2026-03-21 to 2026-03-26) finally broken, validates multi-week automation investment

Q1 flagship products stalled in pre-launch holding pattern: Homer needs 2-3 paying users, Parallax hackathon at 29 PRs/136 commits nearing Feb 16 deadline, Rune PR #1 open with "full build complete" since 2026-03-21—all three flagged critical for 7 consecutive days with no launch commits, suggests deployment/go-to-market blockers

System disk space degradation accelerating toward failure: 3GB (2026-03-21) → 4GB (2026-03-22/2026-03-23) → 5GB (2026-03-24) → 11GB (2026-03-26) → 16GB (2026-03-27)—recovery pattern suggests external cleanup happened off-system between 2026-03-24 and 2026-03-26, but root cause (log rotation, temp file accumulation) remains unaddressed

MILO agent focus dysfunction becoming operational risk: 46% focus score flagged for 6 consecutive days (2026-03-21 to 2026-03-26) with standing order to "set ONE thing"—persistent underperformance despite daily briefings suggests task prioritization system failure or goal definition problem

Portfolio automation infrastructure maturing: auto-refresh commits appearing daily 2026-03-23 (Dae bridge trading sync), 2026-03-27 (4 snapshot commits: 9254266, 1eaa453, c8d1aa3, 2b6785f)—financial data pipeline stabilizing after self-healing system deployment
